title: Hooks Artifact Outline
description: **Hooks Artifact Outline** centralizes inspector and tab outline fetching: change artifacts via `outlineChangeArtifact`, workspace specs via `getSpecOutline` / `outlineSpecDraft`, always passing the current editor buffer when outlining the open file.
context: **Hooks Artifact Outline** centralizes inspector and tab outline fetching: change artifacts via `outlineChangeArtifact`, workspace specs via `getSpecOutline` / `outlineSpecDraft`, always passing the current editor buffer when outlining the open file.

rules.requirement: hook selects port method by context
rules:
- Change artifact: `outlineChangeArtifact(changeName, filename, { content })`
- Workspace spec: `outlineSpecDraft` when buffer provided; else `getSpecOutline` with `filename` query

rules.requirement: hook refetches when buffer length changes on Outline tab
rules: While Outline inspector mode is active, refetch MUST occur when editor content changes so structure tracks unsaved edits (debounce optional; correctness required).

scenarios.requirement: hook selects port method by context
scenarios.name: Change artifact calls outlineChangeArtifact
then: outlineChangeArtifact is invoked with filename and content buffer

scenarios.requirement: hook selects port method by context
scenarios.name: Workspace spec uses draft POST when content passed
then: outlineSpecDraft is called with filename and content

scenarios.requirement: hook refetches when buffer length changes on Outline tab
scenarios.name: Typing updates outline request
given: Outline tab active and dirty buffer
then: subsequent outline result can include new section

scenarios.name: hook uses SpecdDataPort only — primary path
then: AND no forbidden side effects occur

scenarios.name: hook uses SpecdDataPort only — guard path
given: inputs that stress the requirement boundary
then: errors or skips are explicit and documented
